mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POST(MEMBER_ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_RATING) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{postRating})
mapper.select: SELECT p.POST_ID, p.POST_TITLE, p.POST_RATING, p.POST_CREATED_AT, m.MEMBER_NAME FROM POST p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY p.POST_ID DESC

SELECT p.POST_ID, p.MEMBER_ID, p.POST_TITLE, p.POST_CONTENT, p.POST_IMG, p.POST_RATING, p.POST_CREATED_AT, p.POST_UPDATED_AT, m.MEMBER_NAME, pl.PLACE_NAME, pl.PLACE_ADDRESS, pl.PLACE_LAT, pl.PLACE_LNG FROM POST p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl on p.PLACE_ID = pl.PLACE_ID WHERE p.POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE POST SET POST_TITLE = #{postTitle}, POST_CONTENT = #{postContent}, POST_RATING = #{postRating}, POST_UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
